title: Site-Specific Conjugation to Cys-Engineered THIOMAB™ Antibodies
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"w4ovy","text":"Antibodies bearing engineered cysteineresidues (termed THIOMAB™ antibodies) enablethe site-selective attachment of adrug, label or other payloadfor specific delivery to certain tissues (e.g., tumors). This Chapter describes detailed methods we have developedand optimizedfor the conjugation, purification and analysis of THIOMAB™antibody drug conjugates (TDCs).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xxol4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
